name: product_showcase_video
description: Suede Labs product video producer for agents, founders, brands, ecommerce shops, marketplaces, and launch teams that need a fast 5-second product showcase from a single product image. Turns an image URL into a professional AI image-to-video ad creative with cinematic lighting, camera motion, clean composition, and commercial polish. Best for product demos, landing pages, social ads, Amazon/Shopify assets, token/project promos, app launches, consumer goods, fashion, collectibles, music merch, and paid x402/ACP media generation workflows.

image_url.description: Public HTTP(S) URL of the product image to animate. Use a clear product photo with the full item visible.

prompt.description: Optional creative direction for motion, camera, lighting, background, mood, and brand style.
examples: rotate slowly on a clean white background with soft studio lighting
premium close-up with slow zoom, luxury reflections, and subtle sparkle effects

examples.prompt: A crisp ecommerce ad with a slow orbit, soft shadows, premium white studio background, and subtle light sweep
